title: mentha arvensis f. glabra
intro: Mentha arvensis f. glabra, also known as glabrous field mint or smooth field mint, is a subspecies of the mint plant that is native to Europe and Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mentha arvensis f. glabra include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from headaches and respiratory problems. This plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are often used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
